app.title: GLM-5.1: Towards Long-Horizon Tasks
app.author: zixuanlimit
proposed_tests: install GLM-5.1 and run on a sample task
import GLM-5.1 and execute a long-horizon task
measure latency and throughput of GLM-5.1 vs baseline
